synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-20960 Moderate: Oracle Linux 9 xorg-x11-server-Xwayland security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-20960

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-20960.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
xorg-x11-server-Xwayland-23.2.7-5.el9_7.i686.rpm
xorg-x11-server-Xwayland-23.2.7-5.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
xorg-x11-server-Xwayland-devel-23.2.7-5.el9_7.i686.rpm
xorg-x11-server-Xwayland-devel-23.2.7-5.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
xorg-x11-server-Xwayland-23.2.7-5.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
xorg-x11-server-Xwayland-devel-23.2.7-5.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/xorg-x11-server-Xwayland-23.2.7-5.el9_7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-62229
CVE-2025-62230
CVE-2025-62231




Description of changes:

[23.2.7-5]
- CVE fix for: CVE-2025-62229 (RHEL-119974), CVE-2025-62230 (RHEL-120021),
               CVE-2025-62231 (RHEL-125017)
